name: El Torito Chicken and Lime Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken breasts until done, then shred.
2. Peel, pit, and slice avocado.
3. Combine stock, lime juice, oregano, basil, pureed chipotle chile, and bay leaf in a stockpot. Season with salt and white pepper to taste. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add shredded chicken, tomatoes, red onion, and cilantro. Return to a boil, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Adjust seasonings as needed.
7. Ladle very hot soup into warm bowls. Drop in cheese cubes.
8. Garnish each serving with tortilla strips, avocado slices, lime slice, and cilantro sprig.
Makes about 1 quart. Each serving contains approximately 313 calories; 1102 mg sodium; 39 mg cholesterol; 20 grams fat; 16 grams carbohydrates; 19 grams protein; 1.5 grams fiber; 57% of calories from fat.
